title: Follow System and Social Graph
description: Implement the complete follow/unfollow functionality including follow button component, follower/following list pages, and the database operations. Add follow buttons to profile pages and user cards. Create pages to view a user's followers and who they're following. Implement follow suggestions based on simple heuristics (users with most followers, recently active). Handle edge cases like following yourself (prevent) and blocking (out of scope for MVP).
